reviews.title: The air-conditioned bedroom emits an unpleasant smell from the toilet.
reviews.text: Booked a spacious 3-bed room on Agoda with a different picture, but when checking in, I got a cramped room with 3 beds. Demanded to see the manager before they agreed to change my room. The air conditioning in the room was broken, and the worst part was that one bed in the inner room had the air conditioning pulling in smells from the toilet; I only discovered this when I went to sleep at midnight and couldn't stand the terrible smell all night. There was no soundproofing, and the room next door was noisy until nearly midnight. When checking out, I sat waiting for the inspection, and after it was done, no one said anything. When I asked, they said they had already reported it, even though I was sitting right in front of them. The service was terrible from the room to the front desk. Had to pay an exorbitant price for an extremely bad, stinky room. 😤

reviews.title: Terrible experience in here
reviews.text:
Pls see my review and concern for your booking if you have time to stay here: 
1. First, I booked room 60m2 for 4 people with 3 bed, I received 40m2 for  4 people with 2 bed. I kindly explain for reception that It’s not the room that I booked but they said with price like that just that room only and they blamed for Angoda booking. 
2. The next day, we went out for hold day and back to room arround 6PM. Room was not clean and even replace the towel, we come to ask and reception said we should put note for them to clean. How???? Even when check in, reception did not tell us anything about that.
3. No clean room and mean we are not received any water fill up in amenities daily. How can?????

Please carefull when you book this hotel for your trip in An Gianh

reviews.text:
Arrived in the evening, reception checked us in then we followed one lady who disappeared & left us to find the elevator (right at the back of the property) & our room? Big rooms & clean enough but smelly sewerage smells as you walk through the place. Hot water jug in room, no coffee or tea or milk or cups or spoons??
Good size smart TV with the apps like Netflix etc. The access road is a bit rough & it’s up the back of town but not far from restaurants etc. The price on Agoda doesn’t reflect the tax paid on the final payment price & ends up costing more at the payment stage? Probably stay somewhere else  next time. Average in my opinion.

reviews.title: Room review
reviews.text:
This place is a HOMESTAY, not a hotel.  
The room is designed very oddly, with a clothes rack and hooks right above the bed, it looks very strange, if something falls on your head while sleeping then that's it.  
Breakfast is included, but it's just bread, fried eggs + water.  
Due to the bus delay, I asked to stay longer and it costs 300,000 VND for 1 hour.  
Motorbikes for rent are also out of stock, I have to rent them from nearby hotels at a cost of 250,000 VND per day due to extra fees.  
The sunset view is beautiful, the space is quiet probably because this area is deserted.

reviews.text:
Location: 15' walk to the center. Some eateries around.
The room: sizeable, bathroom is separated from the toilet by a glass door. The bed is a little hard, common in Vietnam. Two big pluses: a big refrigerator that gets cold pretty fast, good for storing beer. Super fast internet, the tower is just behind the hotel.
Breakfast: lousy.

reviews.positives: La vue de la chambre était très jolie sur les palmiers environnants. Le personnel nous a aidé pour louer des scooters et commander des taxis.
reviews.negatives:
Le gros problème de ce séjour a été l'échange des dôngs en dollars pour passer la frontière vers le Cambodge. Ne faites pas ça dans cet hôtel ou soyez très vigilants ! Nous avons échangé tous nos dôngs contre des dollars à la réception de l'hôtel, mais mauvaise surprise en arrivant à la frontière : notre billet de 100$ a été refusé car trop vieux (et est inutilisable dans le reste du pays). Actuellement au Cambodge, les autres billets fournis par l'hôtel ont également été refusés car trop abîmés. 
Pour l'instant nous avons donc perdu 115$ à cause d'une inattention ou d'une arnaque de l'hôtel.

An and Tuan wait every morning from the beginning of the day to bring drinks to our room. They also guided us to Vạn Linh Pagoda and the Happy Buddha statue, as well as the pancake pagoda, which was very interesting. The hotel staff have made the most impressive impression on me during my stay here.

reviews.title: Love The Little Saigon!
reviews.text: This is such a beautiful hotel. Even though it's listed as a hostel, it's actually a small hotel. I think there's some details in the fine print that prevent it from listing as a hotel. We loved staying there. The rooms are fantastic. Just be sure to book a room with a balcony and "garden view", which have an astounding view over the rice paddies. The hotel has beautiful decor, very comfortable beds, great food in the restaurant and really amazing staff. Every single one of the staff were kind, caring, helpful and extremely efficient.  They helped us book tours at a reasonable price, with pick up from the hotel and back again. It made such a difference to our time in Chau Doc. I cannot recommend this little hotel highly enough. If we come back to Chau Doc, we will come straight back to Little Saigon. A delightful experience!  💜

reviews.title: Very nice hotel
reviews.text: We really liked this place - it's more a hotel than a hostel.  We felt very welcome from the moment that we arrived, our room was nice, clean, fridge, kettle, good bathroom.  Windows that opened wide, at the end of the corridor was a balcony to sit on and admire the surrounding countryside.  Breakfast was very simple, basically a bread roll with a choice of eggs, cheese or jam.  We also had an iced coffee which was delicious.  The young man serving breakfast was always a delight, very charming.  We would stay again.  We caught a taxi from the dock to here and it cost 70,000 which was pretty good for tourists just hailing a cab.  Grab wouldn't work here for us unless it was a grab bike.

reviews.title: A very expensive and mediocre hotel
reviews.text:
Little Saigon hotel has the chance to be close to the 2 main avenues that lead to the center of Chau Doc. Still, it is a 20 to 25 min to the main square where you can find Chau Doc market.
Rooms are spacious and view to the mountain is nice but there is an issue with cleaning. In the room and in the bathroom 
As for the price, I am also responsible because I bought it last minute 
But, when you pay a high price, I think the minimum is getting a clean room. 
The person at the reception told me that there was a famous buddhist celebration which explains high occupation and prices, though I only bumped into 3 to 4 people in the hotel…
I did not like my experience at Little Saigon Hotel therefore I would not recommend it.

reviews.title: Für den Preis ok
reviews.text:
Wir wollten uns unbedingt die Höhlen Pagoda anschauen und auf den Sam Berg zum Sonnenuntergang.  Beides war fantastisch.  Die Pagode ist schon sehr außergewöhnlich.  Das Hotel hat uns den Transport Organisiert.  Allerdings waren die ca 30 € etwas überzogen.  Das Hotel hat große Zimmer,  aber sehr lieblos, veraltet und semi sauber. Das Frühstück ein Witz. Ein halbes Glas Kaffee,  1 Bquette Brötchen mit Ei oder Marmelade oder Käse. Keine Garnitur,  sehr traurig. Die Lage ist ok, zum Fluss ca 20 Minuten zu laufen. 
Für den Preis ok aber 2 Übernachtungen genügen vollkommen.  Wir sind früher abgereist. Das Hotel hat die Busfahrt organisiert. Das Bett ist bequem und es war weitgehend ruhig.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
スタッフの方々のホスピタリティが素晴らしかったです。
チェックアウトの日、カントーへ向かうバスのチケットを買いにバスターミナルへ行く予定でしたが、フロントのスタッフがバス会社に電話してくれたおかげで大変スムーズに予約を取ることができ、とても助かりました。
また、ホテルからバスターミナルまでバス会社のシャトルバスに乗る予定でしたが、何らかの理由でシャトルバスがキャンセルになったようでした。バス出発時刻が迫る中の出来事でしたが、フロントのスタッフがタクシーを手配してくれたおかげでバスに乗り遅れずにすみました。

また、バイクの貸し出しサービスが提供されており、初日に利用することにしました。当初Grabを利用して市内を回る予定でしたが、市内はどこでもGrabやタクシーが捕まるわけではありませんでした。結果として、自分たちでバイクを運転して移動するのはとても効率的でした。提案いただいたスタッフの方に感謝です。

また、部屋の窓や共有のバルコニーからはサム山が臨め、ここで1日過ごせる！というくらい素晴らしい眺めと新鮮な空気を楽しめました。

チャウドックを再訪したら、またこのホテルに泊まりたいです！
